## 2025-02-10 - Day 1: Problem discovery start

- Task summary: Started this one by sitting down and trying to understand what Edge AI Runtime Evaluation should actually become. I did not rush into code yet. The main thing here was to write a simple problem statement for Edge AI Runtime Evaluation and the user it serves so the project had a decent base. I was still mostly figuring out the shape of it, so a lot of the day went into small notes and half clear ideas. There were a few moving parts here, so I kept simplifying the plan in my head before touching anything else.
- Deliverable: By the end of the day I had problem statement written down in a rough way, which was enough to stop guessing and move into the next step. I also left myself a few rough reminders for the next day so I would not have to rediscover the same context again.
